pagination.mechanism: All items are rendered on a single page with no pagination controls visible.

requires_subpages.reason: Items in the listing show only a title text inside .notetext elements. No case number, address, date, status or permit details are visible in the listing. Each item wraps an <a> tag suggesting clickable links to detail pages, but href attributes appear empty in the captured HTML - likely populated dynamically by Blazor WebAssembly.

notes: Site is built on Blazor WebAssembly (note version string '21.0.2978.2' and blazor-error-ui div). This means the page is a SPA rendered client-side - a standard HTTP fetch will likely return an empty shell and items must be scraped with a headless browser (e.g. Playwright/Puppeteer) after Blazor has hydrated the DOM. The relevant section for bygglov/kungorelser is 'Kungörelser och tillkännagivanden' (tabindex=6 items). A secondary relevant section is 'Justerade protokoll' which contains bygg- och miljönämnden protocols. The <a> tags have no visible href in the static HTML - links are likely injected by Blazor on interaction. Scraper must wait for full DOM render before extracting links. PARKERAD: Blazor WASM renderar inte i Playwright - 0 bytes HTML. Samma problem som Tyresö.
